name: Acolyte
description: You have spent your life in the service of a temple to a specific god or pantheon of gods.
feature_description: As an acolyte, you command the respect of those who share your faith, and you can perform the religious ceremonies of your deity.
equipment: a prayer book or prayer wheel

name: Artisan
description: You are skilled in the creation and repair of objects, whether tools, weapons, or art.
feature_description: You have a set of artisan's tools that you can use to create fine objects.
equipment: a letter of introduction from your former guild

name: Charlatan
description: You have always enjoyed playing the role of someone else, and you're adept at slipping into a new persona.
feature_description: You have created a second identity that includes a name, occupation, and supporting documentation.
equipment: tools of the con you used (such as forgery supplies, gaming sets, or musical instruments)

name: Criminal
description: You are an experienced criminal with a history of breaking the law.
feature_description: You have a reliable and trustworthy contact who acts as your liaison to a network of other criminals.
equipment: a set of dark common clothes including a hood

name: Entertainer
description: You thrive in front of an audience. You are a skilled performer who knows how to captivate and entertain.
feature_description: You can always find a place to perform, usually in a tavern, inn, or other establishment that caters to an audience.
equipment: a trinket that belonged to your first patron

name: Farmer
description: You grew up working the land, tending to crops and livestock.
feature_description: You have a good understanding of the seasons and can predict the weather.

name: Guide
description: You are an expert at navigating through difficult terrain and finding your way through the wilderness.
feature_description: You can travel at a fast pace without suffering the usual penalties.

name: Hermit
description: You have spent most of your life in seclusion, apart from the clamor and宴 of society.
feature_description: The seclusion of your chosen hermitage gave you access to a unique and powerful discovery.
equipment: a scroll case stuffed full of notes from your studies or contemplation
an inert scroll as a relic from your past life

name: Merchant
description: You are a skilled trader who has traveled far and wide, dealing in goods and services.
feature_description: You have a membership in a merchant's guild that gives you access to resources and contacts.

name: Noble
description: You understand wealth, power, and privilege. You have been raised in a life of luxury.
feature_description: Your noble status gives you access to high society, and you can expect to receive special treatment in many circumstances.

name: Sage
description: You have spent years in study, acquiring knowledge of the arcane and the natural world.
feature_description: You can find information about the arcane and the natural world through research and study.
equipment: a letter from your favorite colleague

name: Sailor
description: You have spent most of your life on the water, whether a ship, a boat, or a dock.
feature_description: You can arrange for free passage on a ship, either as a passenger or as a member of the crew.
equipment: a trinket that belonged to your ship

name: Scribe
description: You are skilled in the art of writing and record-keeping.
feature_description: You can quickly and accurately copy documents and texts.

name: Soldier
description: You have served in the military, either as a soldier, an officer, or a mercenary.
feature_description: You have a military rank that gives you authority over other soldiers.
equipment: a trophy taken from a fallen enemy

name: Wayfarer
description: You are a wanderer who has traveled far and wide, experiencing many cultures and places.
feature_description: You have a network of friends in many places who can provide you with information and assistance.
